sentences.target: Tu me dis lesquelles tu choisis ce soir.
sentences.reading: /ty mə di lekɛl ty ʃwazi sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: Tu me dis lesquelles tu choisis ce soir.
translations.ipa: /ty mə di lekɛl ty ʃwazi sə swaʁ/
translations.en: Tell me which ones you’re choosing tonight.
translations.de: Sag mir, welche du heute Abend auswählst.
translations.ko: 오늘 밤에 어떤 것들을 고르는지 말해줘.
translations.ru: Скажи мне, какие ты выбираешь сегодня вечером.
translations.pt: Me diz quais você vai escolher hoje à noite.
translations.he: תגיד לי אילו אתה בוחר הערב.
translations.tr: Bu akşam hangilerini seçeceğini bana söyle.
translations.vi: Hãy nói cho tôi biết tối nay bạn chọn những cái nào.
translations.ar: قل لي أيّ منها ستختار الليلة.
translations.nl: Zeg me welke je vanavond kiest.
translations.uk: Скажи мені, які ти вибираєш сьогодні ввечері.
translations.hu: Mondd meg, melyeket választasz ma este.
translations.hi: मुझे बताओ कि आज रात तुम कौन-से चुन रहे हो.
translations.pl: Powiedz mi, które wybierasz dziś wieczorem.
translations.nb: Si meg hvilke du velger i kveld.
translations.id: Beri tahu aku mana yang kamu pilih malam ini.
translations.sv: Säg mig vilka du väljer ikväll.
translations.ro: Spune-mi pe care le alegi diseară.
translations.cs: Řekni mi, které si dnes večer vybereš.
translations.da: Fortæl mig, hvilke du vælger i aften.
translations.fi: Kerro minulle, mitkä valitset tänä iltana.
translations.ja: 今夜どれを選ぶか教えてください。

tokens.explanation: 2nd-person singular subject pronoun; subject of the main verb 'dis'.
1st-person clitic object pronoun; indirect object of 'dis' (Tu me dis = you tell me).
Present indicative, 2nd person singular; main verb of the clause.
Interrogative/relative pronoun, feminine plural; within the embedded interrogative clause it is the direct object of 'choisis'. The entire clause functions as the complement of 'dis'.
Subject pronoun of the embedded verb 'choisis'.
Present indicative, 2nd person singular; verb of the embedded interrogative clause headed by 'lesquelles'.
Demonstrative determiner modifying 'soir'; together 'ce soir' forms a temporal adjunct meaning 'tonight'.
Noun head of the NP 'ce soir'; the phrase functions adverbially as a time expression.

sentences.target: Je sais lesquelles je prends demain.

translations.fr: Je sais lesquelles je prends demain.
translations.en: I know which ones I’m taking tomorrow.
translations.es: Sé cuáles voy a llevar mañana.
translations.de: Ich weiß, welche ich morgen mitnehme.
translations.zh-Hans: 我知道我明天要拿哪些。
translations.yue: 我知道我聽日會攞邊啲。
translations.ru: Я знаю, какие я возьму завтра.
translations.pt: Eu sei quais vou levar amanhã.
translations.he: אני יודע אילו אני לוקח מחר.
translations.vi: Tôi biết ngày mai mình sẽ lấy những cái nào.
translations.ar: أنا أعرف أيّ منها سأخذ غدًا.
translations.nl: Ik weet welke ik morgen meeneem.
translations.uk: Я знаю, які я візьму завтра.
translations.hi: मुझे पता है कि मैं कल कौन-से ले जाऊँगा.
translations.nb: Jeg vet hvilke jeg tar med i morgen.
translations.id: Aku tahu mana yang akan aku bawa besok.
translations.sv: Jag vet vilka jag tar med imorgon.
translations.ro: Știu pe care le iau mâine.
translations.da: Jeg ved, hvilke jeg tager med i morgen.
translations.ja: 明日どれを持っていくか分かっている。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular subject pronoun; subject of 'sais'.
Present indicative, 1st person singular; main verb.
Interrogative/relative pronoun, feminine plural; object of 'prends' inside the embedded interrogative clause; the clause is the complement of 'sais'.
Subject pronoun of the embedded verb 'prends'.
Present indicative, 1st person singular; verb of the embedded clause headed by 'lesquelles'.
Temporal adverb modifying 'prends'.

sentences.target: On décide lesquelles on garde, d'accord.

translations.fr: On décide lesquelles on garde, d'accord.
translations.en: We’re deciding which ones to keep, okay.
translations.es: Estamos decidiendo cuáles nos quedamos, de acuerdo.
translations.de: Wir entscheiden, welche wir behalten, okay.
translations.ko: 우리가 어떤 것들을 남길지 결정하는 중이야, 알겠지.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在决定留哪些，好吧。
translations.yue: 我哋而家決定留邊啲，好吧。
translations.pt: Estamos decidindo quais vamos manter, tá bom.
translations.vi: Chúng ta đang quyết định giữ cái nào, nhé.
translations.ar: نحن نقرّر أيّ منها سنحتفظ بها، حسنًا.
translations.nl: We besluiten welche we houden, oké.
translations.hi: हम तय कर रहे हैं कि कौन-से रखेंगे, ठीक है.
translations.nb: Vi bestemmer hvilke vi beholder, ok.
translations.id: Kami sedang memutuskan mana yang akan kami simpan, oke.
translations.sv: Vi bestämmer vilka vi ska behålla, okej.
translations.ro: Decidem pe care le păstrăm, bine.
translations.da: Vi beslutter, hvilke vi beholder, okay.
translations.ja: 私たちはどれを残すか決めているところだよ、いいよね。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (impersonal 'on', often meaning 'we'); subject of 'décide'.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular (agreement with 'on'); main verb.
Interrogative/relative pronoun, feminine plural; object of 'garde' inside the embedded clause; the clause is the complement of 'décide'.
Subject pronoun of the embedded verb 'garde'.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular (agreement with 'on'); verb of the embedded clause.
Preposition 'de' contracted before a vowel; here part of the fixed expression 'd'accord' used as a discourse marker ('okay, agreed').
Noun meaning 'agreement'; together with 'd'' forms the set phrase 'd'accord', functioning here as a tag/interjection ('okay').

sentences.target: Vous nous dites lesquelles vous avez chez vous.
sentences.reading: /vuz nu dit lekɛl vuz‿ave ʃe vu/

translations.fr: Vous nous dites lesquelles vous avez chez vous.
translations.ipa: /vuz nu dit lekɛl vuz‿ave ʃe vu/
translations.en: Tell us which ones you have at your place.
translations.es: Dinos cuáles tienes en tu casa.
translations.de: Sag uns, welche du zu Hause hast.
translations.it: Dicci quali hai a casa tua.
translations.ko: 네 집에 어떤 것들이 있는지 우리에게 말해줘.
translations.zh-Hans: 告诉我们你家里有哪些。
translations.yue: 同我哋講你屋企有邊啲。
translations.ru: Скажите нам, какие у вас есть дома.
translations.pt: Diga quais você tem na sua casa.
translations.he: תגיד לנו אילו יש לך בבית.
translations.vi: Hãy cho chúng tôi biết ở nhà bạn có những cái nào.
translations.ar: أخبرنا أيّ منها لديك في بيتك.
translations.nl: Vertel ons welke je thuis hebt.
translations.uk: Скажіть нам, які у вас є вдома.
translations.hu: Mondd meg nekünk, melyek vannak otthon nálad.
translations.hi: हमें बताओ कि तुम्हारे घर में कौन-से हैं.
translations.pl: Powiedz nam, które masz u siebie w domu.
translations.el: Πες μας ποια έχεις στο σπίτι σου.
translations.nb: Fortell oss hvilke du har hjemme hos deg.
translations.id: Beri tahu kami mana yang kamu punya di rumah.
translations.sv: Säg oss vilka du har hemma hos dig.
translations.ro: Spune-ne care ai la tine acasă.
translations.cs: Řekněte nám, které máte u sebe doma.
translations.da: Fortæl os, hvilke du har hjemme hos dig.
translations.fi: Kerro meille, mitkä sinulla on kotona.
translations.ja: あなたの家にどれがあるか教えてください。

tokens.explanation: 2nd-person plural/formal subject pronoun; subject of 'dites'.
1st-person plural clitic object pronoun; indirect object of 'dites' (Vous nous dites = you tell us).
Present indicative, 2nd person plural; main verb.
Interrogative/relative pronoun, feminine plural; object of 'avez' within the embedded clause; the clause is the complement of 'dites'.
Subject pronoun of the embedded verb 'avez'.
Present indicative, 2nd person plural; verb of the embedded clause headed by 'lesquelles'.
Preposition introducing the locative complement 'chez vous' ('at your place').
Disjunct pronoun complement of the preposition 'chez'.

Je sais lesquelles je prends demain.
On décide lesquelles on garde, d'accord.
Vous nous dites lesquelles vous avez chez vous.

I know which ones I’m taking tomorrow.
We’re deciding which ones to keep, okay.
Tell us which ones you have at your place.
